data_coverage_summary: DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. Published API scope combines transaction retrieval with transaction lifecycle handling.
buyer_guidance: Use this API when the integration needs to move beyond charger status into the history and management of charging transactions.
overview: DepotFinity is a cloud-based software service that is used to monitor, report, schedule and manage the charging operations of chargers within a depot. Transaction management blends historical operational records with transaction lifecycle updates. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope combines transaction retrieval with transaction lifecycle handling.

ingest_considerations: This surface includes telemetry or event-oriented payloads that should be modeled for time-based ingestion or monitoring workflows.
The published surface includes mutation or submission capabilities, so integrations should enforce explicit governance around which upstream systems are allowed to write.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Transaction Management API.
